steps.title: Track the contrast
steps.content: The text gives two outcomes for the pay-as-you-wish model: Bright Harbor earned below expectations, while Nora Whitfield earned significantly from listeners paying more than suggested.

steps.title: Compare the choices
steps.content: Choice B contradicts the band-versus-individual examples; Choice C invents later price changes; Choice D invents a comparison with traditional pricing. Choice A captures success for some musicians and disappointment for others. The answer is A.
